options.name: --file
options.description: [Optional] The schema file to be imported

options.name: --url
options.description: [Optional] The url from which to get the schema

options.name: --headers
options.description:
[Optional] Additional headers to send that are
required by the URL. Provide as a JSON object.
Use [$prompt:prompt_title] to get a prompt at
runtime.

options.name: --namespace
options.description: The target namespace for generated files

options.name: --outputDir
options.description: The target directory for generated files

options.name: --public
options.description:
Set access modifiers to 'public' instead of '
internal' (default)

options.name: --force
options.description: Overwrite any files in the target directory

options.name: --help
